identity.name: Button
identity.description: Interactive control for primary calls-to-action, secondary actions, and tertiary text-style navigation. Renders as <button> by default; when href is provided, renders as <a> for link navigation. Wraps HTML button attributes via ButtonHTMLAttributes.

props.name: variant
props.description: Controls visual weight and colour treatment. primary = gradient CTA with glow. secondary = bordered ghost with primary-fixed-dim text. tertiary = label-md styled text-only, hover underline. ghost = muted surface-variant text, hover on-surface.
usage_rules: Use primary for the single highest-priority action per section
Use secondary for a complementary action that pairs with primary
Use tertiary for navigation-style links within body text
Use ghost for toolbar, nav, or utility actions where visual prominence must be minimal

props.name: size
props.description: Controls padding and font size. sm=px-4/py-2/text-sm. md=px-6/py-3/text-sm. lg=px-8/py-4/text-base. All three sizes use the same font-medium weight and rounded-md radius.
usage_rules: Use lg in hero sections and CTA footers (Book a Chat, See the Headless DS)
Use md as the default in cards and page sections
Use sm in compact UI like toolbars, badges, or inline controls

props.name: href
props.description: When provided, the component renders as an <a> element instead of <button>. Use for navigation links. When undefined, renders as <button> with full ButtonHTMLAttributes support including onClick, type, disabled.
usage_rules: Pass href for all navigation actions — internal paths ('/system') or external URLs
Do not pass href and onClick together; choose the element type appropriate to the action
For external links, add target and rel as standard HTML attributes via props spread

props.name: children
props.description: Button label text. May include inline icons via flex gap-2 layout. All variants centre content with inline-flex and justify-center.
usage_rules: Keep labels short and action-oriented: 'Book a Chat', 'View System', 'Explore'
Do not use punctuation at end of labels
Avoid 'Click here' or 'Learn more' without specificity — CTAs should state the action

props.name: className
props.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged via clsx after base and variant styles. Use for layout overrides (width, margin) — not for colour or typography overrides.
usage_rules: Never override colour or typography via className — use variant and size props instead
Acceptable uses: w-full on mobile, mt-4 for spacing adjustments

base.classes: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 font-medium rounded-md transition-all duration-200 focus-ring cursor-pointer
base.description: Applied to every Button regardless of variant or size

css_properties.focus-ring: outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary-container); outline-offset: 2px — applied on :focus-visible only

primary.design_intent: Signature gradient (primary-container → secondary-container) signals the highest-priority CTA

secondary.design_intent: Bordered ghost that pairs with primary — indicates a complementary but lower-priority action

tertiary.design_intent: Text-only navigation link styled with mono label-md type treatment — blends into body copy but signals interactivity

ghost.design_intent: Minimal-footprint control for utility actions — toolbar buttons, nav items, dismiss actions

variants.label: Primary CTA — hero or section footer
Secondary CTA — paired alongside primary
variants.example: <Button variant="secondary" size="lg" href="/headless-ds">See the Headless DS</Button>

variants.label: Tertiary — inline text navigation
variants.site_usage: Body copy links, thoughts page navigation

variants.label: Button with onClick — form or interaction
variants.site_usage: Contact form, explore page intent submission

states.default: Renders static with variant-appropriate background, text, and border

hover.primary: brightness(110%) on gradient — lightens without changing hue
hover.secondary: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.10) background fill — subtle primary tint
hover.tertiary: underline with 4px offset — signals link nature

states.focus_visible: 2px solid var(--color-primary-container) outline with 2px offset — applies only on keyboard focus via .focus-ring utility
states.disabled: Inherits HTML disabled attribute from ButtonHTMLAttributes spread. No dedicated disabled styles in source — relies on browser default opacity and cursor:not-allowed. Avoid using disabled state; prefer removing the button when the action is unavailable.
states.active: No explicit active styles. transition-all 200ms provides smooth state transitions.

accessibility.role: button (native <button> element) or link (native <a> element when href provided)

keyboard.button_element: Enter and Space activate — native browser behaviour

accessibility.focus_indicator: Visible .focus-ring class applies outline on :focus-visible — satisfies WCAG 2.1 AA 1.4.11 Non-text Contrast

colour_contrast.secondary: #b4c5ff text on dark surface — verify per background
colour_contrast.tertiary: #4cd7f6 on dark surface — verify per background
colour_contrast.ghost: #c3c6d7 on dark surface — approximately 7:1 on surface-container

semantic_notes: When href is provided the component renders as <a> — do not add role='button' to anchor elements
Button text must describe the action, not the component type

rules: Never hardcode hex or rgb values — always use variant prop to access design tokens
Never add inline styles to Button — use className for layout adjustments only
Render as <a> (via href) for navigation; render as <button> for actions
Use only the four defined variants — do not invent new colour treatments
Only one primary Button per visible section — visual hierarchy requires a single apex CTA

antipatterns.reason: Bypasses design token system — use variant='primary' instead
onClick on an anchor element is a misuse of semantics — choose button or anchor

antipatterns.pattern: Multiple primary Buttons in the same section
antipatterns.reason: Destroys visual hierarchy — pair primary with secondary or ghost
className must not override token-defined colours — use a different variant

maps_to_intent.user_intent: Navigate to a page within the site
maps_to_intent.label: The System

maps_to_intent.user_intent: Inline navigation link in body text
maps_to_intent.label: Read more

site_usage_examples.usage: Primary 'Book a Chat' + Secondary 'See the Headless DS' — canonical primary/secondary pairing
Cyan-coloured anchor tags styled inline — NOT using Button component. Agent note: these should be migrated to Button variant='primary' / variant='secondary'
Anchor tags styled inline for 'Let's Build Yours' and 'View the Full File' — same migration note as above
